title: transparent potions!
body:
## TRANSPARENT POTIONS

This resoursepack makes all of the potions TRANSPARENT!

## A little backstory of this resourcepack

I was working on another resourcepack project for a server, I needed to replace a texture of potion with custom model data. But there was a mistake: I accidentally set only layer0 for potion, no layer1 for liquid inside. And when I tested resourcepack, it looked pretty good, so I decided to publish this, continuing the series of transparent tools.

## Here's how it looks in-game
![quick showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6e0835f2f37be58c95f27b4ba285397b78da4d2.png)
![default and dark mode showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8562a6ba51fc2dff56f973bb9ddb966b21cf2e5a.png)
